changes.description: Added Phase Transitions subsection under Memory Engine documenting discuss→plan→implement→review→ship lifecycle with forward-only advisory rule.
Split single except handler in post_commit_graph() into ImportError (with setup instructions) and Exception (with structured warning including exception type and remediation hint).
Added Current Work section with workflow-deepdive-v2 in-progress. Added workflow-audit-fixes and graph-integrity-fixes to Completed Features. Updated date to 2026-03-04.
Added resolver agent to architecture diagram agent list. Updated date to 2026-03-04.
